title: sphaeralcea prostrata
intro: Sphaeralcea prostrata, also known as the desert marigold or prostrate globe mallow, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow or orange flowers and spreading growth habit. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea prostrata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
